_comment: Gate SQL Registry. Each entry defines one CTE block that the pipeline LEFT JOINs into `combined`. Adding a new gate = add entry here + add gate block in one_ticker_gates.py. CTEs are injected before `combined` and LEFT JOINed on c.ticker = <cte_alias>.ticker. Fields listed under `fields` are added to the SELECT list of `combined`. Fields listed under `score_fields` are inputs to compute_scores(). Gates are evaluated in Python; the `pos_expr` / `neg_expr` are Python expressions referencing row fields.

gates.label: ROCE
gates.description: Return on Capital Employed ≥ 18% (strong), < 8% (poor)
gates.neg_expr: r['roce'] < 8

gates.label: Free Cash Flow
gates.description: Latest annual FCF > 0 (cash generative)
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r['fcf']) and r['fcf'] > 0
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r['fcf']) and r['fcf'] < 0

gates.label: Profit CAGR 3Y
gates.description: 3-year net profit CAGR ≥ 15% (strong compounder), < 0% (shrinking)
gates.pos_expr: profit_cagr is not None and profit_cagr >= 15
gates.neg_expr: profit_cagr is not None and profit_cagr < 0

gates.label: CFO vs Net Profit
gates.description: CFO > Net Profit → earnings backed by real cash; CFO < 50% NP → aggressive accounting
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r['cfo']) and pd.notna(r['profit_now']) and r['profit_now'] > 0 and r['cfo'] > r['profit_now']
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r['cfo']) and pd.notna(r['profit_now']) and r['profit_now'] > 0 and r['cfo'] < r['profit_now'] * 0.5
gates.note_expr: "CFO > Net Profit = earnings are real cash"

gates.label: Debt/Equity
gates.description: D/E < 0.5 (low leverage), > 1.5 (over-leveraged); skipped for financials
gates.pos_expr: not is_financial and de is not None and de < 0.5
gates.neg_expr: not is_financial and de is not None and de > 1.5
gates.note_expr: ('N/A for financial sector' if is_financial else f"D/E = {r['D/E']} (target <0.5)")

gates.label: Interest Coverage
gates.description: EBIT / Interest ≥ 5× (comfortable), < 1.5× (distressed); skipped for financials
gates.cte_sql:
icr_cte AS (
    SELECT a.ticker,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric='Operating Profit' THEN val END) AS ebit_annual,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric='Interest'         THEN val END) AS interest_annual
    FROM profit_loss a
    WHERE a.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM profit_loss WHERE ticker = a.ticker)
    GROUP BY a.ticker
)
gates.pos_expr: not is_financial and pd.notna(r['ebit_annual']) and pd.notna(r['interest_annual']) and r['interest_annual'] > 0 and (r['ebit_annual'] / r['interest_annual']) >= 5
gates.neg_expr: not is_financial and pd.notna(r['ebit_annual']) and pd.notna(r['interest_annual']) and r['interest_annual'] > 0 and (r['ebit_annual'] / r['interest_annual']) < 1.5
gates.note_expr: ('N/A for financial sector' if is_financial else (f"ICR = {round(r['ebit_annual']/r['interest_annual'],1)}x" if pd.notna(r.get('ebit_annual')) and pd.notna(r.get('interest_annual')) and r.get('interest_annual',0) > 0 else 'ICR: data unavailable'))

gates.label: Sales CAGR 3Y
gates.description: 3-year revenue CAGR ≥ 10% (growing top line), < 0% (shrinking)
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r.get('sales_now')) and pd.notna(r.get('sales_3y')) and r.get('sales_3y',0) > 0 and ((r['sales_now']/r['sales_3y'])**(1/3)-1)*100 >= 10
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r.get('sales_now')) and pd.notna(r.get('sales_3y')) and r.get('sales_3y',0) > 0 and ((r['sales_now']/r['sales_3y'])**(1/3)-1)*100 < 0
gates.note_expr: f"Sales CAGR = {round(((r['sales_now']/r['sales_3y'])**(1/3)-1)*100,1) if pd.notna(r.get('sales_now')) and pd.notna(r.get('sales_3y')) and r.get('sales_3y',0)>0 else '—'}%"

gates.label: ROE Trend
gates.description: ROE ≥ 15% (value-creating), < 8% (poor shareholder returns)
gates.cte_sql:
roe_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT ticker,
        MAX(CASE WHEN years=0  THEN val END) AS roe_ttm,
        MAX(CASE WHEN years=3  THEN val END) AS roe_3y,
        MAX(CASE WHEN years=5  THEN val END) AS roe_5y
    FROM return_on_equity
    GROUP BY ticker
)
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r.get('roe_ttm')) and r.get('roe_ttm',0) >= 15
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r.get('roe_ttm')) and r.get('roe_ttm',0) < 8
gates.note_expr: f"ROE TTM = {round(r['roe_ttm'],1) if pd.notna(r.get('roe_ttm')) else '—'}% | 3Y = {round(r['roe_3y'],1) if pd.notna(r.get('roe_3y')) else '—'}%"

gates.label: P/E vs Sector
gates.description: Stock P/E at ≥15% discount to sector median (cheap), or >30% premium (expensive)
gates.pos_expr: pe_discount_pct is not None and pe_discount_pct >= 15
gates.neg_expr: pe_discount_pct is not None and pe_discount_pct < -30
gates.note_expr: f"Stock P/E {r['Stock P/E']} vs Sector {r['Sector P/E']} → {r['PE Discount %']:+.1f}%"

gates.label: PEG Ratio
gates.description: PEG < 1.0 (cheap for growth rate), > 2.5 (priced to perfection)
gates.pos_expr: peg is not None and peg < 1.0
gates.neg_expr: peg is not None and peg > 2.5

gates.label: Price/Book
gates.description: P/B < 3 (reasonable asset pricing), > 8 (sky-high premium)
gates.pos_expr: pb is not None and pb < 3.0
gates.neg_expr: pb is not None and pb > 8.0
gates.note_expr: f"P/B = {round(pb,2) if pb is not None else '—'} (target <3)"

gates.label: Dividend Yield
gates.description: Dividend yield ≥ 1% (shareholder-friendly), 0% with high PE (speculative)
gates.cte_sql:
div_cte AS (
    SELECT nse_symbol AS ticker, dividend_yield
    FROM general_info
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY nse_symbol ORDER BY nse_symbol) = 1
)
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r.get('dividend_yield')) and r.get('dividend_yield',0) >= 1.0
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r.get('dividend_yield')) and r.get('dividend_yield',0) == 0 and pd.notna(r.get('stock_p_e')) and r.get('stock_p_e',0) > 30

gates.label: Price/Sales
gates.description: P/S ratio < 2 (reasonable revenue multiple), > 10 (narrative stock)
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r.get('market_cap')) and pd.notna(r.get('sales_now')) and r.get('sales_now',0) > 0 and (r['market_cap'] / r['sales_now']) < 2
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r.get('market_cap')) and pd.notna(r.get('sales_now')) and r.get('sales_now',0) > 0 and (r['market_cap'] / r['sales_now']) > 10
gates.note_expr: f"P/S = {round(r['market_cap']/r['sales_now'],2) if pd.notna(r.get('market_cap')) and pd.notna(r.get('sales_now')) and r.get('sales_now',0)>0 else '—'}"

gates.label: Sales Momentum
gates.description: Sequential quarterly sales acceleration (Q0 > Q1 > Q2)
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r['sales_q0']) and pd.notna(r['sales_q1']) and pd.notna(r['sales_q2']) and r['sales_q0'] > r['sales_q1'] > r['sales_q2']
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r['sales_q0']) and pd.notna(r['sales_q1']) and r['sales_q0'] < r['sales_q1']

gates.label: Profit Acceleration
gates.description: Latest quarter net profit > prior quarter
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r['profit_q0']) and pd.notna(r['profit_q1']) and r['profit_q0'] > r['profit_q1']
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r['profit_q0']) and pd.notna(r['profit_q1']) and r['profit_q0'] < r['profit_q1'] and r['profit_q0'] > 0

gates.label: OPM Expansion
gates.description: Operating margin expanding vs prior quarter; contraction > 3pp is a red flag
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r['opm_q0']) and pd.notna(r['opm_q1']) and r['opm_q0'] > r['opm_q1']
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r['opm_q0']) and pd.notna(r['opm_q1']) and r['opm_q0'] < r['opm_q1'] - 3

gates.label: Promoter Buying
gates.description: Promoter stake stable or rising; > 2pp drop is a sell signal
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r['promoter']) and pd.notna(r['promoter_prev']) and r['promoter'] >= r['promoter_prev']
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r['promoter']) and pd.notna(r['promoter_prev']) and r['promoter'] < r['promoter_prev'] - 2

gates.label: Institutional Accumulation
gates.description: FII or DII stake rising = smart-money accumulation
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r['fii']) and pd.notna(r['fii_prev']) and pd.notna(r['dii']) and pd.notna(r['dii_prev']) and (r['fii'] >= r['fii_prev'] or r['dii'] >= r['dii_prev'])
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r['fii']) and pd.notna(r['fii_prev']) and pd.notna(r['dii']) and pd.notna(r['dii_prev']) and r['fii'] < r['fii_prev'] and r['dii'] < r['dii_prev']

gates.label: EPS Growth
gates.description: Latest quarter EPS > prior quarter (per-share earnings momentum)
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r.get('eps_q0')) and pd.notna(r.get('eps_q1')) and r.get('eps_q1',0) > 0 and r.get('eps_q0',0) > r.get('eps_q1',0)
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r.get('eps_q0')) and pd.notna(r.get('eps_q1')) and r.get('eps_q0',0) < r.get('eps_q1',0)
gates.note_expr: f"EPS Q0={round(r['eps_q0'],2) if pd.notna(r.get('eps_q0')) else '—'} vs Q1={round(r['eps_q1'],2) if pd.notna(r.get('eps_q1')) else '—'}"

gates.label: YoY Sales Growth
gates.description: Latest quarter sales > same quarter last year (YoY growth ≥ 10%)
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r.get('sales_q0')) and pd.notna(r.get('sales_q3')) and r.get('sales_q3',0) > 0 and ((r['sales_q0']-r['sales_q3'])/r['sales_q3'])*100 >= 10
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r.get('sales_q0')) and pd.notna(r.get('sales_q3')) and r.get('sales_q3',0) > 0 and r.get('sales_q0',0) < r.get('sales_q3',0)
gates.note_expr: f"YoY Sales = {round(((r['sales_q0']-r['sales_q3'])/r['sales_q3'])*100,1) if pd.notna(r.get('sales_q0')) and pd.notna(r.get('sales_q3')) and r.get('sales_q3',0)>0 else '—'}%"

gates.label: BB Squeeze
gates.description: Bollinger Band width at/near 63-day low = coiled spring; > 0.35 = chaotic
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r['bb_width']) and pd.notna(r['min_bb_63d']) and r['bb_width'] <= r['min_bb_63d'] * 1.15
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r['bb_width']) and r['bb_width'] > 0.35
gates.note_expr: f"BB width={round(r['_bb_width'],3) if pd.notna(r['_bb_width']) else '—'} (min63d={round(r['_min_bb_63d'],3) if pd.notna(r['_min_bb_63d']) else '—'})"

gates.label: MA50 Zone
gates.description: Price within 0–12% above 50DMA (riding trend); > 25% or below -8% = extended/broken
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r['dist_from_ma50']) and 0 < r['dist_from_ma50'] < 12
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r['dist_from_ma50']) and (r['dist_from_ma50'] > 25 or r['dist_from_ma50'] < -8)

gates.label: 52W High Proximity
gates.description: Price within 5% of 52-week high (momentum); > 40% off high (distress/broken trend)
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r['pct_from_52w']) and r['pct_from_52w'] >= -5
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r['pct_from_52w']) and r['pct_from_52w'] < -40

gates.label: Volume Confirmation
gates.description: 5-day avg volume ≥ 1.1× 50-day avg (smart money active); < 0.6× (interest fading)
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r['volume_ratio']) and r['volume_ratio'] >= 1.1
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r['volume_ratio']) and r['volume_ratio'] < 0.6

gates.label: RSI Zone
gates.description: RSI 40–65 = healthy trend zone; < 30 = oversold panic; > 75 = overbought froth
gates.cte_sql:
rsi_cte AS (
    SELECT ticker AS rsi_ticker, date, rsi
    FROM ticker_momentum
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY date DESC) = 1
)
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r.get('rsi')) and 40 <= r['rsi'] <= 65
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r.get('rsi')) and (r['rsi'] < 30 or r['rsi'] > 75)

gates.label: ADX Trend Strength
gates.description: ADX ≥ 25 = strong directional trend; < 15 = trendless chop
gates.cte_sql:
adx_cte AS (
    SELECT ticker AS adx_ticker, date, adx
    FROM ticker_momentum
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY date DESC) = 1
)
gates.pos_expr: pd.notna(r.get('adx')) and r['adx'] >= 25
gates.neg_expr: pd.notna(r.get('adx')) and r['adx'] < 15

icr_cte.join: LEFT JOIN icr_cte      icr ON c.ticker = icr.ticker

div_cte.join: LEFT JOIN div_cte       dv ON c.ticker = dv.ticker

roe_trend_cte.join: LEFT JOIN roe_trend_cte rt ON c.ticker = rt.ticker

rsi_cte.join: LEFT JOIN rsi_cte       rc ON c.ticker = rc.rsi_ticker

adx_cte.join: LEFT JOIN adx_cte       ac ON c.ticker = ac.adx_ticker
